_comment: Maxim v1.0.0 — declarative MCP server registry. Consolidated from 9 servers (v1.0.0) to 7 servers. dispatch + skills → catalog; design absorbed into context; context also gained watch_* tools. 47 tools total across 7 servers.

mxm-portfolio.description: Portfolio metrics, project state, sync_portfolio across 21+ projects (7 tools)

mxm-context.description: Project context + design refs + drift detection. 13 tools (v1.0.0: absorbed design, added watch_run/watch_report/watch_configure)

mxm-catalog.description: Agent + office + skill + command catalog. 9 tools (v1.0.0: merged from dispatch + skills)

mxm-compliance.description: 14 compliance frameworks (GDPR, PIPEDA, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, SOC2, UAE-PDPL, CASL, FINTRAC, EU AI Act, ISO 27001/13485/14971, NIST CSF, WCAG). 5 tools

mxm-behavioral.description: 64 behavioral science frameworks (Fogg, COM-B, EAST, Hook, Cialdini, JTBD, AIDA, Nudge Theory, Proactive Watch + 55 more). 5 tools

mxm-memory.description: Session history, decision log, memory search/store across project boundaries. 4 tools

mxm-voice.description: Voice-driven executive office routing. Wraps mbailey/voicemode for STT (Whisper) + TTS (Kokoro). Requires VoiceMode plugin installed. 4 tools
